title: dracontia fortunae
side_effects: Dracontia fortunae can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased risk of allergic reactions, which may manifest as hives, itching, or swelling. Prolonged use or excessive dosage can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of the Dracontia fortunae plant may cause cardiac problems, such as irregular heartbeat or palpitations. Additionally, improper preparation or dosage can lead to interactions with other medications, resulting in adverse effects on blood pressure or other vital signs.
